commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c3139b0570975dec0c6e3c21c60744d0fbd950fd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR filters failed item and command-output progress from Discord drafts and unconditionally suppresses synthetic tool-error warning payloads for Discord-originated runs.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +67. Total +89 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: failed callbacks currently reach the Discord draft renderer, and the added mock tests exercise that path. There is no after-fix live Discord reproduction of the complete user-visible flow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The contributor should preserve the existing fallback warning, add focused coverage, and supply real Discord proof; the missing external-environment proof makes this a human-only merge blocker.

target.title: Suppress failed tool progress in Discord
target.body:
## Summary

- suppress synthetic tool-error warning payloads for Discord-originated runs
- skip failed/error item progress and failed command-output progress before Discord draft rendering
- add Discord monitor regressions for failed tool progress, failed command output, and the suppression default

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts` passes: 107 tests
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord can leak internal failed tool progress or synthetic tool-error warning text as channel-visible messages after an otherwise normal run.

Real environment tested: Local Vitest regression coverage in a fresh fork checkout; separately observed against an installed Discord canary before preparing this PR.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: The Discord monitor test file passes all 107 tests, including new assertions that failed item progress and failed command output do not update Discord draft text, and that Discord reply options pass `suppressToolErrorWarnings: true`.

Observed result after fix: Failed/error tool progress remains out of Discord-visible draft output while normal assistant delivery behavior stays covered by existing Discord monitor tests.

What was not tested: No live Discord bot run was executed from this source checkout, and broader extension/full CI was not run locally.
target.author: davefano

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
